member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldConfigLoader
member.summary: Centralized loader for analysis field configuration and prompt metadata. Used by both the API controller and the data gathering services.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldConfigLoader.LoadFields(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Load analysis field definitions from config or fall back to defaults. Optionally writes a default config file when missing.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldConfigLoader.GetPromptFileName(Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldInfo)
member.summary: Resolve the prompt file name (configFileName or default pattern) for a field.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldConfigLoader.LoadPrompt(System.String,Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldInfo)
member.summary: Load a prompt for a field, accepting either { "prompt": "" } or { "systemPrompt": "" } shapes, or plain text.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldConfigLoader.ResolveTypeSignature(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves the type signature for a GenericType by instantiating it and reading _signature.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldConfigLoader.ResolveType(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves a type by name, searching all loaded assemblies.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldInfo.ComponentName
member.summary: Component name for base/analysis view rendering (e.g., "ItemsList", "ColorScheme")

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldInfo.RowComponentName
member.summary: Component name for row/activity list rendering (e.g., "ItemsListRow", "ColorSchemeRow")

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldInfo.ChatComponentName
member.summary: Component name for chat message rendering (e.g., "ItemsListChat", "ColorSchemeChat") If not specified, convention is {ComponentName}Chat

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldInfo.GenericType
member.summary: Optional generic type name for structured output (e.g., "ToneOfVoice"). When set, the content must be valid JSON matching this type's structure.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.AnalysisFieldInfo.TypeSignature
member.summary: JSON schema signature for the GenericType, used to instruct the LLM on expected format.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.Extensions.ToolsContextWebSearchExtensions
member.summary: Adds web search tools to the chat context. Allows the AI to search the internet and fetch web pages for additional context.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.Extensions.ToolsContextWebSearchExtensions.AddWebSearchTools(Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.StoreToolsContext,Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IWebSearchService)
member.summary: Adds web search tools for gathering online information during chat.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ReadOnlyDocumentToolsContext
member.summary: Tools context providing read-only document and web access for chat conversations. This context explicitly excludes data gathering tools to separate concerns between conversational AI and background data extraction.
member.remarks:
Tools included: - Web search and page reading - Project file reading - PDF analysis - BigQuery queries - Analysis field tools (if enabled)
Tools excluded: - StoreGatheredData (handled by )

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ReadOnlyDocumentToolsContext.Model
member.summary: The AI model being used for tool execution.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ReadOnlyDocumentToolsContext.ProjectId
member.summary: The project identifier.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ReadOnlyDocumentToolsContext.ChatId
member.summary: The chat identifier.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ReadOnlyDocumentToolsContext.ReadWholeWebsite(System.String)
member.summary: Imports an entire website into the document store.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for which tools should be available in StoreToolsContext. Each client can customize which tools they want to enable.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.EnableWebSearch
member.summary: Enable web search capability (PerformWebSearch tool)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.EnableReasoning
member.summary: Enable reasoning capability (PerformReasoning tool)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.EnableWebScraping
member.summary: Enable web scraping tools (PerformReadSitemap, PerformReadHtmlPage)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.EnableFileOperations
member.summary: Enable file operation tools (PerformReadProjectFile, AnalyseChatDocument, AnalyseChatPdfFile, PerformGetProjectFilesList)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.EnableBigQuery
member.summary: Enable BigQuery integration (PerformGetBigQueryResults tool)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.EnableDataGathering
member.summary: Enable data gathering tools (StoreGatheredData)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.EnableAnalysisTools
member.summary: Enable analysis field tools (PerformGetAnalysisFieldValue, PerformUpdateAnalysisField, PerformGenerateAnalysisFieldWithFeedback)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.EnableWorkflowComponents
member.summary: Enable workflow component tools (ShowLogoDecision, etc.)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.EnableLayeredImages
member.summary: Enable layered image generation tools (GenerateLayeredImage) Allows AI to create multi-layer images (PDN/ORA/PSD format)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.All
member.summary: Returns a configuration with all tools enabled (default behavior)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.Minimal
member.summary: Returns a minimal configuration with only essential tools

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Store.ToolsConfiguration.Default
member.summary: Returns default configuration (currently same as All)
